sql.where:
ubc.cnvn_sttus_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@CNVN_STTS_CMP}'
and ub.bsns_year = #{bsnsYear}
and ube.bsns_excclc_id is null
and ube.bsns_excclc_id is not null
and ubpa.receipt_no like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
and ubpd.task_nm_ko like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
and ub.bsns_nm like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
and cm.member_nm like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
and cm.bizrno like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')

mapper.select: /** UsptBsnsCnvnDao.selectListCount */ select count(ubc.bsns_cnvn_id) from uspt_bsns_cnvn ubc inner join uspt_bsns_plan_doc ubpd on ubpd.bsns_plan_doc_id = ubc.bsns_plan_doc_id inner join uspt_task_reqst_wct utrw on utrw.bsns_plan_doc_id = ubpd.bsns_plan_doc_id inner join uspt_bsns_slctn ubs on ubs.bsns_slctn_id = ubpd.bsns_slctn_id inner join uspt_last_slctn_trget ulst on ulst.last_slctn_trget_id = ubs.last_slctn_trget_id inner join uspt_evl_last_slctn uels on uels.evl_last_slctn_id = ulst.evl_last_slctn_id inner join uspt_evl_plan uep on uep.evl_plan_id = uels.evl_plan_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_rcept ubpr on ubpr.pblanc_id = uep.pblanc_id and ubpr.rcept_odr = uep.rcept_odr inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa on ubpa.pblanc_id = ubpr.pblanc_id and ubpa.rcept_odr = ubpr.rcept_odr and ubpa.apply_id = ulst.apply_id inner join cmmt_member cm on cm.member_id = ubpa.member_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpr.pblanc_id inner join uspt_bsns ub on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd inner join uspt_bsns_charger ubc2 on ubc2.bsns_cd = ub.bsns_cd and ubc2.insider_id = #{insiderId} left outer join uspt_bsns_excclc ube on ube.bsns_cnvn_id = ubc.bsns_cnvn_id and ube.task_reqst_wct_id = utrw.task_reqst_wct_id

/** UsptBsnsCnvnDao.selectList */ select ubc.bsns_cnvn_id , ubc.cnvn_bgnde , ubc.cnvn_endde , ubpa.receipt_no , ubpd.total_wct , ubpd.task_nm_ko as task_nm , ub.bsns_nm , ub.bsns_year , cm.member_nm , cm.bizrno , utrw.task_reqst_wct_id , utrw.bsns_year as reqst_bsns_year , ube.created_dt , case when ube.bsns_excclc_id is null then '대기중' else '등록완료' end as process_sttus , row_number() over (order by ubc.created_dt desc) as rn from uspt_bsns_cnvn ubc inner join uspt_bsns_plan_doc ubpd on ubpd.bsns_plan_doc_id = ubc.bsns_plan_doc_id inner join uspt_task_reqst_wct utrw on utrw.bsns_plan_doc_id = ubpd.bsns_plan_doc_id inner join uspt_bsns_slctn ubs on ubs.bsns_slctn_id = ubpd.bsns_slctn_id inner join uspt_last_slctn_trget ulst on ulst.last_slctn_trget_id = ubs.last_slctn_trget_id inner join uspt_evl_last_slctn uels on uels.evl_last_slctn_id = ulst.evl_last_slctn_id inner join uspt_evl_plan uep on uep.evl_plan_id = uels.evl_plan_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_rcept ubpr on ubpr.pblanc_id = uep.pblanc_id and ubpr.rcept_odr = uep.rcept_odr inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa on ubpa.pblanc_id = ubpr.pblanc_id and ubpa.rcept_odr = ubpr.rcept_odr and ubpa.apply_id = ulst.apply_id inner join cmmt_member cm on cm.member_id = ubpa.member_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpr.pblanc_id inner join uspt_bsns ub on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd inner join uspt_bsns_charger ubc2 on ubc2.bsns_cd = ub.bsns_cd and ubc2.insider_id = #{insiderId} left outer join uspt_bsns_excclc ube on ube.bsns_cnvn_id = ubc.bsns_cnvn_id and ube.task_reqst_wct_id = utrw.task_reqst_wct_id
offset #{beginRowNum} -1 limit #{itemsPerPage}

/** UsptBsnsCnvnDao.selectDetail */ select ubc.bsns_cnvn_id , ubc.apply_id , ub.bsns_nm , cm.member_id , cm.member_nm , cm.bizrno , cm.ceo_nm , cm.enc_mobile_no , cm.charger_nm , ubpd.task_nm_ko as task_nm , ubpa.receipt_no , ubc.cnvn_bgnde , ubc.cnvn_endde , ubc.cnvn_sttus_cd , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@CNVN_CODE_GROUP}', ubc.cnvn_sttus_cd) as cnvn_sttus , utrw.bsns_year , utrw.sport_budget , (utrw.alotm_cash + utrw.alotm_acthng) as alotm , (utrw.sport_budget + utrw.alotm_cash + utrw.alotm_acthng) as wct_totamt , utrw.bsns_year as reqst_bsns_year , utrw.task_reqst_wct_id , ube.excut_sbsidy , ube.excut_bsnm_alotm , ube.excut_cnvn_totamt , ube.attachment_group_id , ubc2.charger_author_cd from uspt_bsns_cnvn ubc inner join uspt_bsns_plan_doc ubpd on ubpd.bsns_plan_doc_id = ubc.bsns_plan_doc_id inner join uspt_task_reqst_wct utrw on utrw.bsns_plan_doc_id = ubpd.bsns_plan_doc_id inner join uspt_bsns_slctn ubs on ubs.bsns_slctn_id = ubpd.bsns_slctn_id inner join uspt_last_slctn_trget ulst on ulst.last_slctn_trget_id = ubs.last_slctn_trget_id inner join uspt_evl_last_slctn uels on uels.evl_last_slctn_id = ulst.evl_last_slctn_id inner join uspt_evl_plan uep on uep.evl_plan_id = uels.evl_plan_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_rcept ubpr on ubpr.pblanc_id = uep.pblanc_id and ubpr.rcept_odr = uep.rcept_odr inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa on ubpa.pblanc_id = ubpr.pblanc_id and ubpa.rcept_odr = ubpr.rcept_odr and ubpa.apply_id = ulst.apply_id inner join cmmt_member cm on cm.member_id = ubpa.member_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpr.pblanc_id inner join uspt_bsns ub on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd inner join uspt_bsns_charger ubc2 on ubc2.bsns_cd = ub.bsns_cd and ubc2.insider_id = #{insiderId} left outer join uspt_bsns_excclc ube on ube.bsns_cnvn_id = ubc.bsns_cnvn_id and ube.task_reqst_wct_id = utrw.task_reqst_wct_id where ubc.cnvn_sttus_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@CNVN_STTS_CMP}' and ubc.bsns_cnvn_id = #{bsnsCnvnId} and utrw.task_reqst_wct_id = #{taskReqstWctId}

/** UsptBsnsCnvnDao.selectFrontBsnsCnvnDetail */ select ubc.cnvn_sttus_cd /*협약상태코드(G:CNVN_STTUS)*/ , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('CNVN_STTUS', ubc.cnvn_sttus_cd) as cnvn_sttus_nm /*협약상태명*/ , ubpd.task_nm_ko /*과제명*/ , ubc.cnvn_de /*협약일자*/ , ubc.cnvn_bgnde /*협약시작일*/ , ubc.cnvn_endde /*협약종료일*/ , ubc.cnvn_bdt /*협약서본문*/ , ubc.cnvn_file_group_id /*협약파일그룹ID*/ , ubc.bsns_mgc_sign_id /*사업단서명ID*/ , case when ubc.bsns_mgc_nm is null then '인공지능산업융합사업단' else ubc.bsns_mgc_nm end as bsns_mgc_nm /*사업단명*/ , ubc.bsns_mgc_ceo_nm as bsns_mgc_ceo_nm /*사업단대표자명*/ , ubc.bsns_mgc_bizrno /*사업단사업자번호*/ , ubc.bsns_mgc_sign_dt /*사업단서명일시 */ , to_char(ubc.bsns_mgc_sign_dt ,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') as char_bsns_mgc_sign_dt /*char_사업단서명일시 */ , ubpd.member_id /*사업자(주관사ID)*/ , (select member_nm from cmmt_member where member_id = ubpd.member_id ) as member_nm /*사업자명(주관사명)*/ , (select ceo_nm from cmmt_member where member_id = ubpd.member_id ) as ceo_nm /*주사업자 대표자명*/ , (select bizrno from cmmt_member where member_id = ubpd.member_id ) as bizrno /*주사업자 대표자사업자번호*/ , ubc.bsnm_sign_dt /*주사업자 서명일시*/ , to_char(ubc.bsnm_sign_dt ,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') as char_bsnm_sign_dt /*char_주사업자 서명일시 */ , ubc.cnvn_trmnat_de /*협약해지일*/ , ubc.cnvn_trmnat_div_cd /*협약해지구분코드*/ , ubc.cnvn_trmnat_resn_cn /*해지사유내용*/ , ubc.redemp_trgamt /*환수대상금액*/ , ubc.redemp_compt_amount /*환수완료금액*/ , ubc.redemp_de /*환수일*/ , ubc.cnvn_trmnat_file_group_id /*협약해지첨부파일그룹ID*/ , ubc.bsns_cnvn_id /*사업협약ID */ , ubc.apply_id /*신청ID */ , ubc.bsns_plan_doc_id /*사업계획서ID*/ from uspt_bsns_cnvn ubc /** 사업협약*/ inner join uspt_bsns_plan_doc ubpd /** 사업계획서*/ on ubc.bsns_plan_doc_id = ubpd.bsns_plan_doc_id where ubc.bsns_cnvn_id = #{bsnsCnvnId} and ubc.apply_id = #{applyId}
and ubc.cnvn_sttus_cd = #{cnvnSttusCd} /*협약상태코드*/

/** UsptBsnsCnvnDao.selectBsnsCnvnDoc */ select ub.bsns_nm /*사업명*/ , ubc.cnvn_sttus_cd /*협약상태코드(G:CNVN_STTUS)*/ , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('CNVN_STTUS', ubc.cnvn_sttus_cd) as cnvn_sttus_nm /*협약상태명*/ , ubpd.task_nm_ko /*과제명*/ , ubc.cnvn_de /*협약일자*/ , ubc.cnvn_bgnde /*협약시작일*/ , ubc.cnvn_endde /*협약종료일*/ , ubc.cnvn_bdt /*협약서본문*/ , ubc.bsns_mgc_sign_id /*사업단서명ID*/ , case when ubc.bsns_mgc_nm is null then '인공지능산업융합사업단' else ubc.bsns_mgc_nm end as bsns_mgc_nm /*사업단명*/ , ubc.bsns_mgc_ceo_nm as bsns_mgc_ceo_nm /*사업단대표자명*/ , ubc.bsns_mgc_bizrno /*사업단사업자번호*/ , ubc.bsns_mgc_sign_dt /*사업단서명일시 */ , to_char(ubc.bsns_mgc_sign_dt ,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') as char_bsns_mgc_sign_dt /*char_사업단서명일시 */ , ubpd.member_id /*사업자(주관사ID)*/ , (select member_nm from cmmt_member where member_id = ubpd.member_id ) as member_nm /*사업자명(주관사명)*/ , (select ceo_nm from cmmt_member where member_id = ubpd.member_id ) as ceo_nm /*주사업자 대표자명*/ , (select bizrno from cmmt_member where member_id = ubpd.member_id ) as bizrno /*주사업자 대표자사업자번호*/ , ubc.bsnm_sign_dt /*주사업자 서명일시*/ , to_char(ubc.bsnm_sign_dt ,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') as char_bsnm_sign_dt /*char_주사업자 서명일시 */ , ubc.bsns_cnvn_id /*사업협약ID */ , ubc.apply_id /** 신청ID */ , ubc.bsns_plan_doc_id /*사업계획서ID*/ from uspt_bsns ub /**사업*/ inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp /**사업공고*/ on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd and ubp.enabled = true inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa /**사업공고신청자*/ on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id /*공공id*/ inner join uspt_bsns_cnvn ubc /*사업협약*/ on ubpa.apply_id = ubc.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_plan_doc ubpd /**사업계획서*/ on ubc.bsns_plan_doc_id = ubpd.bsns_plan_doc_id where ubc.bsns_cnvn_id = #{bsnsCnvnId} and ubc.apply_id = #{applyId}

/** UsptBsnsCnvnDao.selectBsnsCnvnListCnt */ select count(1) from ( select (select member_nm from cmmt_member where member_id = ubpd.member_id ) as member_nm /*사업자명(주관사명)*/ , ubc.bsns_cnvn_id /*사업협약ID */ , ubc.apply_id /* 신청ID */ , ubc.bsns_plan_doc_id /*사업계획서ID*/ from uspt_bsns ub /**사업*/ inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp /**사업공고*/ on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd and ubp.enabled = true inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa /**사업공고신청자*/ on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id /*공공id*/ inner join uspt_bsns_cnvn ubc /*사업협약*/ on ubpa.apply_id = ubc.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_plan_doc ubpd /**사업계획서*/ on ubc.bsns_plan_doc_id = ubpd.bsns_plan_doc_id inner join uspt_task_rspnber utr /**과제책임자*/ on ubpd.bsns_plan_doc_id = utr.bsns_plan_doc_ID where 1=1
and ub.bsns_year = #{bsnsYear} /*사업년도*/
and ub.bsns_nm like concat('%', #{bsnsNm}, '%') /*사업명*/
and ubc.cnvn_sttus_cd = #{cnvnSttusCd} /*협약상태코드*/
and ubc.cnvn_de between #{cnvnDeStart} and #{cnvnDeEnd} /*협약일자*/
and ubpd.task_nm_ko like concat('%', #{taskNmKo}, '%') /*과제명*/
and utr.rspnber_nm like concat('%', #{rspnberNm}, '%') /*과제책임자명*/
) a where 1=1
and a.member_nm like concat('%', #{memberNm}, '%') /*주관업체명*/
/** UsptBsnsCnvnDao.selectCnvnSttusCd */ select cnvn_sttus_cd from uspt_bsns_cnvn where bsns_cnvn_id = #{bsnsCnvnId} /*사업협약ID*/ and apply_id = #{applyId} /*신청ID*/
mapper.update: /** UsptBsnsCnvnDao.updateCnvnCnclsCreat */ update uspt_bsns_cnvn set cnvn_sttus_cd = #{cnvnSttusCd} /*협약상태코드(G:CNVN_STTUS)*/ , cnvn_de = #{cnvnDe} /*협약일자*/ , cnvn_bgnde = #{cnvnBgnde} /*협약시작일*/ , cnvn_endde = #{cnvnEndde} /*협약종료일*/ , cnvn_bdt = #{cnvnBdt} /*협약서본문*/ , bsns_mgc_nm = #{bsnsMgcNm} /*사업단명*/ , bsns_mgc_ceo_nm = #{bsnsMgcCeoNm} /*사업단대표자명*/ , bsns_mgc_bizrno = #{bsnsMgcBizrno} /*사업단사업자번호*/ , updater_id = #{updaterId} , updated_dt = #{updatedDt} where bsns_cnvn_id = #{bsnsCnvnId} /*사업협약ID*/ and apply_id = #{applyId} /*신청ID*/
mapper.select:
/** UsptBsnsCnvnDao.selectCnvnTrmnatListCnt */ select count(1) from ( select (select member_nm from cmmt_member where member_id = ubpd.member_id ) as member_nm /*사업자명(주관사명)*/ , ubc.bsns_cnvn_id /*사업협약ID */ , ubc.apply_id /* 신청ID */ , ubc.bsns_plan_doc_id /*사업계획서ID*/ from uspt_bsns ub /**사업*/ inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp /**사업공고*/ on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd and ubp.enabled = true inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa /**사업공고신청자*/ on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id /*공공id*/ inner join uspt_bsns_cnvn ubc /*사업협약*/ on ubpa.apply_id = ubc.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_plan_doc ubpd /**사업계획서*/ on ubc.bsns_plan_doc_id = ubpd.bsns_plan_doc_id inner join uspt_task_rspnber utr /**과제책임자*/ on ubpd.bsns_plan_doc_id = utr.bsns_plan_doc_ID where 1=1
and ubc.cnvn_sttus_cd = #{cnvnSttusCd} /*협약상태코*/
and ubc.cnvn_sttus_cd in ('CNST05', 'CNST06') /* 완료, 해지*/
and ub.bsns_year = #{bsnsYear} /*사업년도*/
and ubc.cnvn_trmnat_de between #{cnvnTrmnatDeStart} and #{cnvnTrmnatDeEnd} /*협약해지일*/
and ubpa.receipt_no = #{receiptNo} /*접수번호*/
and ubpd.task_nm_ko like concat('%', #{taskNmKo}, '%') /*과제명*/
and ub.bsns_nm like concat('%', #{bsnsNm}, '%') /*사업명*/
) a where 1=1
and a.member_nm like concat('%', #{memberNm}, '%') /*주관업체명*/

/** UsptBsnsCnvnDao.selectCnvnTrmnatList */ select a.* , row_number() over (order by a.receipt_no desc) as rn from ( select ub.bsns_nm /*사업명*/ , ub.bsns_year /*사업년도*/ , ubpa.receipt_no /*접수번호*/ , ubp.pblanc_nm /*공고명*/ , ubpd.task_nm_ko /*과제명*/ , ubc.cnvn_sttus_cd /*협약상태코드(G:CNVN_STTUS)*/ , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('CNVN_STTUS', ubc.cnvn_sttus_cd) as cnvn_sttus_nm /*협약상태명*/ , (select member_nm from cmmt_member where member_id = ubpd.member_id ) as member_nm /*사업자명(주관사명)*/ , utr.rspnber_nm /*과제책임자명*/ , ubc.cnvn_bgnde /*협약시작일*/ , ubc.cnvn_endde /*협약종료일*/ , ubc.cnvn_trmnat_de /*협약해지일*/ , cnvn_trmnat_div_cd /*협약해지구분코드*/ , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('CNVN_TRMNAT_DIV', ubc.cnvn_trmnat_div_cd) as cnvn_trmnat_div_nm /*협약해지구분코드명*/ , ubc.bsns_cnvn_id /*사업협약ID */ , ubc.apply_id /* 신청ID */ , ubc.bsns_plan_doc_id /*사업계획서ID*/ from uspt_bsns ub /**사업*/ inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp /**사업공고*/ on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd and ubp.enabled = true inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa /**사업공고신청자*/ on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id /*공공id*/ inner join uspt_bsns_cnvn ubc /*사업협약*/ on ubpa.apply_id = ubc.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_plan_doc ubpd /**사업계획서*/ on ubc.bsns_plan_doc_id = ubpd.bsns_plan_doc_id inner join uspt_task_rspnber utr /**과제책임자*/ on ubpd.bsns_plan_doc_id = utr.bsns_plan_doc_ID where 1=1
and ubc.cnvn_sttus_cd = #{cnvnSttusCd} /*협약상태코*/
and ubc.cnvn_sttus_cd in ('CNST05', 'CNST06') /* 완료, 해지*/
and ub.bsns_year = #{bsnsYear} /*사업년도*/
and ubc.cnvn_trmnat_de between #{cnvnTrmnatDeStart} and #{cnvnTrmnatDeEnd} /*협약해지일*/
and ubpa.receipt_no = #{receiptNo} /*접수번호*/
and ubpd.task_nm_ko like concat('%', #{taskNmKo}, '%') /*과제명*/
and ub.bsns_nm like concat('%', #{bsnsNm}, '%') /*사업명*/
) a where 1=1
and a.member_nm like concat('%', #{memberNm}, '%') /*주관업체명*/
offset #{beginRowNum} -1 limit #{itemsPerPage}

/** UsptBsnsCnvnDao.selectCnvnTrmnatDetail */ select ub.bsns_nm /*사업명*/ , ub.bsns_year /*사업년도*/ , ubpa.receipt_no /*접수번호*/ , ubpd.task_nm_ko /*과제명*/ , (select member_nm from cmmt_member where member_id = ubpd.member_id ) as member_nm /*사업자명(주관사명)*/ , utr.rspnber_nm /*과제책임자명*/ , ubc.cnvn_sttus_cd /*협약상태코드(G:CNVN_STTUS)*/ , ubc.cnvn_trmnat_de /*협약해지일*/ , ubc.cnvn_trmnat_de /*협약해지일*/ , ubc.cnvn_trmnat_div_cd /*협약해지구분코드*/ , ubc.cnvn_trmnat_resn_cn /*해지사유내용*/ , ubc.redemp_trgamt /*환수대상금액*/ , ubc.redemp_compt_amount /*환수완료금액*/ , ubc.redemp_de /*환수일*/ , ubc.cnvn_trmnat_file_group_id /*협약해지첨부파일그룹ID*/ , ubpd.member_id /*사업자(주관사ID)*/ , ubc.bsns_cnvn_id /*사업협약ID */ , ubc.apply_id /* 신청ID */ , ubc.bsns_plan_doc_id /*사업계획서ID*/ from uspt_bsns ub /**사업*/ inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp /**사업공고*/ on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd and ubp.enabled = true inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa /**사업공고신청자*/ on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id /*공공id*/ inner join uspt_bsns_cnvn ubc /*사업협약*/ on ubpa.apply_id = ubc.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_plan_doc ubpd /**사업계획서*/ on ubc.bsns_plan_doc_id = ubpd.bsns_plan_doc_id inner join uspt_task_rspnber utr /**과제책임자*/ on ubpd.bsns_plan_doc_id = utr.bsns_plan_doc_ID where ubc.bsns_cnvn_id = #{bsnsCnvnId} and ubc.apply_id = #{applyId}
mapper.update: /** UsptBsnsCnvnDao.updateCnvnTrmnat */ update uspt_bsns_cnvn set cnvn_sttus_cd = #{cnvnSttusCd} /*협약상태코드(G:CNVN_STTUS)*/ , cnvn_trmnat_de = #{cnvnTrmnatDe} /*협약해지일*/ , cnvn_trmnat_div_cd = #{cnvnTrmnatDivCd} /*협약해지구분코드*/ , cnvn_trmnat_resn_cn = #{cnvnTrmnatResnCn} /*해지사유내용*/ , redemp_trgamt = #{redempTrgamt} /*환수대상금액*/ , redemp_compt_amount = #{redempComptAmount} /*환수완료금액*/ , redemp_de = #{redempDe} /*환수일*/ , cnvn_trmnat_file_group_id = #{cnvnTrmnatFileGroupId} /*협약해지첨부파일그룹ID */ , updater_id = #{updaterId} , updated_dt = #{updatedDt} where bsns_cnvn_id = #{bsnsCnvnId} /*사업협약ID*/ and apply_id = #{applyId} /*신청ID*/
mapper.select: /** UsptBsnsCnvnDao.selectCnvnChangeReqMaxOne */ select a.* from ( select ub.bsns_nm /*사업명*/ , ub.bsns_year /*사업년도*/ , ubpa.receipt_no /*접수번호*/ , ubpd.task_nm_ko /*과제명*/ , ubc.cnvn_de /*협약일자*/ , ubc.cnvn_bgnde /*협약시작일*/ , ubc.cnvn_endde /*협약종료일*/ , ubc.cnvn_sttus_cd /*협약상태코드(G:CNVN_STTUS)*/ , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('CNVN_STTUS', ubc.cnvn_sttus_cd) as cnvn_sttus_nm /*협약상태명*/ , ubc.bsns_cnvn_id /*사업협약ID */ , ubc.apply_id /** 신청ID */ , ubpd.bsns_plan_doc_id /*사업계획서ID*/ , ubpd.bsns_slctn_id /*사업선정대상ID */ , row_number() over (order by ubc.cnvn_de desc) as rn from uspt_bsns ub /**사업*/ inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp /**사업공고*/ on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd and ubp.enabled = true inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa /**사업공고신청자*/ on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id /*공공id*/ inner join uspt_bsns_cnvn ubc /*사업협약*/ on ubpa.apply_id = ubc.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_plan_doc ubpd /**사업계획서*/ on ubc.bsns_plan_doc_id = ubpd.bsns_plan_doc_id where 1=1 and ub.bsns_year = #{bsnsYear} and ubpd.task_nm_ko like concat('%', #{taskNmKo}, '%') /*과제명*/ and ubc.cnvn_sttus_cd ='CNST05' /*협약완료*/ and ubpd.creator_id = #{memberId} ) a where rn = 1

/** UsptBsnsCnvnDao.selectCnvnChangeReqBsnsYear */ select ub.bsns_year /*사업년도*/ from uspt_bsns ub /**사업*/ inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp /**사업공고*/ on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd and ubp.enabled = true inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa /**사업공고신청자*/ on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id /*공공id*/ inner join uspt_bsns_cnvn ubc /*사업협약*/ on ubpa.apply_id = ubc.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_plan_doc ubpd /**사업계획서*/ on ubc.bsns_plan_doc_id = ubpd.bsns_plan_doc_id where 1=1 and ubc.cnvn_sttus_cd ='CNST05' /*협약완료*/ and ubpd.creator_id = #{memberId} group by ub.bsns_year

/** UsptBsnsCnvnDao.selectCnvnChangeReqTaskNm */ select ubpd.task_nm_ko /*과제명*/ from uspt_bsns ub /**사업*/ inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp /**사업공고*/ on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd and ubp.enabled = true inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa /**사업공고신청자*/ on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id /*공공id*/ inner join uspt_bsns_cnvn ubc /*사업협약*/ on ubpa.apply_id = ubc.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_plan_doc ubpd /**사업계획서*/ on ubc.bsns_plan_doc_id = ubpd.bsns_plan_doc_id where 1=1 and ub.bsns_year = #{bsnsYear} and ubc.cnvn_sttus_cd ='CNST05' /*협약완료*/ and ubpd.creator_id = #{memberId} group by ubpd.task_nm_ko
